title: Farm Animals Reforged
description: *This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".* This Resource Pack changes the farm animals of the game to be more consistent and good looking.
body:
This Resource Pack changes the farm animals of the game to be more consistent and good looking.

[**REQUIRES OPTIFINE**](https://optifine.net/downloads)

----

This pack changes the models of all farm animals and their related itens

Mobs changed:
- Cows (and it variants)
- Pigs
- Sheeps
- Chickens
- Horse like animals that uses chests to cary things around
- Llamas
- Bees

Items changed:
- All meats related to the reworked animals
- All mushroom soups
- The eggs
- The saddle
- The milk bucket

----

{**This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".**}

If you want to support me:
